public void returnResource(Jedis resource) { super.returnResource(resource); if(checkStatus){ //失败次数清零 backendFails.set(0); }   
1

if(checkStatusThread \(= =\) null）{ checkStatusThread \(\equiv\) new Thread(connectionName + "-check")} publicvoid run() { while(getCheckStatus()){ if(unhealthy \(! =\) null&&unhealthy.get()）{ boolean isBad \(=\) false; Jedis client \(=\) null; try{ client \(=\) super.getResource(); //发送ping命令探测Redis节点状态 client.ping(); unhealthyCompareAndSet(true,false); backendFails.set(0); log.info("detect bookmark recover from failure, set unhealthy=false" \(^+\) getConnectionName(); }catch(Exception e){ isBad \(=\) true; }finally{ if(client \(! =\) null）{ if(isBad){ super.returnBrokenResource(client); }else{ super.returnResource(client); } } } } }try{ Thread.sleep(CHECK_INTEVAL_TIME); } catch (InterruptedException e){ break; }

func (b *googleBreaker) doReq(req func() error, fallback func(err error) error,acceptable Acceptable) error{//判断当前熔断开关是否处于打开的状态if err := b.accept(); err != nil {if fallback != nil {//执行熔断逻辑return fallback(err) } return err} defer func(){ if e := recover(); e != nil {b_markFailure() panic(e)} } () err := req() if acceptable(err) { //客户端发起的请求数和服务端成功处理的请求数都加1b_markSuccess() } else { //客户端发起的请求数加1b_markFailure() } return err} func (b *googleBreaker) markSuccess() {b.stat.Add(1)} func (b *googleBreaker) markFailure() {b.stat.Add(0)}

@Override   
public void onRequestComplete(Context context) { Entry entry \(=\) context.getCurEntry(); if (entry \(\equiv =\) null){ return; }Throwable error \(=\) entry_Error(); //如果发生异常，则增加异常请求数 SimpleErrorCounter counter \(=\) stat.currentWindow().value(); if (error! \(\equiv\) null){ counter_ErrorCount().add(1); } counter.TotalCount().add(1); //根据异常请求数处理熔断开关的状态变更
